title: S + V + such + N + that + S + V（結果子句）

formulas.formula: such + (a/an) + adj. + N + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 用 such 修飾名詞片語來表達結果，that 引導結果子句，表示「如此…的…以至於…」

formulas.formula: such + adj. + N(複數/不可數) + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 複數名詞或不可數名詞前不用冠詞，直接接 such + adj. + N

explanation: such 是修飾名詞的強調詞，與 so...that 句型意義相近但用法不同。such 直接修飾名詞片語（可加冠詞），that 引導結果子句說明造成的結果。單數可數名詞需加 a/an，複數或不可數名詞無需冠詞。注意 such...that 強調名詞本身，而 so...that 強調形容詞或副詞程度。兩種句型可互換改寫，但結構有異。

examples.eng: She told such an interesting story that everyone listened carefully.
examples.chi: 她說了一個如此有趣的故事，以至於每個人都認真聆聽。

examples.eng: It was such bad weather that the outdoor event was cancelled.
examples.chi: 天氣如此惡劣，以至於戶外活動被取消了。

examples.eng: They made such a terrible mistake that the project failed completely.
examples.chi: 他們犯了如此嚴重的錯誤，以至於整個專案完全失敗。

examples.eng: There were such heavy snow that traffic came to a standstill.
examples.chi: 雪下得如此之大，以至於交通完全停止。

extension.tip: 判斷 such vs. so 的關鍵：such 直接修飾名詞，so 修飾形容詞或副詞。此句型強調「什麼樣的事物」造成什麼結果；so...that 強調「程度有多深」。不可數名詞或複數名詞前不需要 a/an，這是常見錯誤。

examples.test: She is so beautiful that everyone admires her.
examples.result: → 改為 such：She is such a beautiful girl that everyone admires her.（so 修飾形容詞，改寫時加名詞）
→ ✓ Such students that...（複數名詞無冠詞）
→ ✓ Such heavy snow that...（不可數名詞無冠詞）

extension.note: 記憶口訣：Such 配名詞，So 配形容詞；單數加冠詞，複數無冠詞。

parts: that most audience members fell asleep.
exercises.sentence: The movie was such a boring film that most audience members fell asleep.
exercises.translation: 這部電影是如此無聊，以至於大多數觀眾都睡著了。

parts: that he decided to accept the job offer.
exercises.sentence: He received such a high salary that he decided to accept the job offer.
exercises.translation: 他得到了如此高的薪水，以至於他決定接受這份工作。

parts: that the game had to be postponed.
exercises.sentence: There was such strong wind that the game had to be postponed.
exercises.translation: 風如此之大，以至於比賽不得不延期。

exercises.sentence: The restaurant served such delicious food that customers kept coming back.
exercises.translation: 這家餐廳的食物如此美味，以至於顧客一直回頭光顧。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的 such...that 結果子句結構，表達故事很有趣。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She told _______ story that everyone in the class enjoyed it.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。such + a/an + 形容詞 + 單數可數名詞 + that，此句 interesting 修飾單數名詞 story，需用冠詞 a。B 項缺冠詞（單數必需）；C 項用 so 後應直接接形容詞，不能跟名詞；D 項 a 後不能接子音開頭的字。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入正確的 such...that 結構，表達天氣很惡劣。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It was _______ weather that the outdoor event had to be postponed.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。不可數名詞 weather 前用 such + 形容詞，不需冠詞。B 項錯誤因不可數名詞不用冠詞；C 項 so 用法不同，so + 形容詞 + that；D 項 badly 是副詞，不符合 such + adj. + N 的結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇能正確完成句子的選項，表達做了如此努力的工作。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The team made _______ efforts that they succeeded in completing the project ahead of schedule.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。複數名詞 efforts 用 such + 形容詞，不需冠詞。A 項 so many 修飾複數名詞時用法不同於 such...that；B 項 such + many 搭配錯誤；D 項 great many 為片語，但前應用 such + many 或 such great，不能同時用。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇使句意通順的 such...that 結構，表達演講很令人印象深刻。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The professor delivered _______ lecture that all students took detailed notes and discussed it for hours afterward.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。such + a/an + 形容詞 + 單數可數名詞 lecture，冠詞必須在形容詞後。A 項詞序錯誤（冠詞應在形容詞後）；C 項混淆 so...that 與 such...that（so + adj. + a + N 的詞序特殊但此處應用 such）；D 項缺少冠詞，單數可數名詞必需。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 那是一場如此激烈的比賽，以至於所有觀眾都站起來歡呼。
translation_exercises.answer: It was such an intense match that all the audience stood up and cheered.
key_points: intense match（單數可數名詞需加冠詞a）
結果子句：all the audience stood up and cheered
hints: 框架：such + a/an + 形容詞 + 單數名詞 + that + 結果子句
常見錯誤：不加冠詞a/an 或將match誤寫為複數matches

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師給了我們這麼多功課，導致我們整個週末都在做作業。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher gave us such a lot of homework that we spent the whole weekend doing assignments.
key_points: such + a lot of + N（不可數名詞homework）
a lot of 作為量詞與such搭配
結果子句：we spent the whole weekend doing assignments
hints: 框架：such + a lot of / lots of + 不可數名詞 + that + 結果子句；或 such + much + 不可數名詞 + that
注意：homework是不可數名詞，不加冠詞在a lot of之後

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他說了這麼令人沮喪的話，以至於她決定再也不相信他。
translation_exercises.answer: He said such discouraging words that she decided never to trust him again.
key_points: such + adj. + 複數名詞 words（複數名詞不加冠詞）
discouraging words（修飾複數名詞的形容詞）
決心性結果：she decided never to trust him again
hints: 框架：such + 形容詞 + 複數名詞 + that + 結果子句；複數或不可數名詞前不加a/an
常見錯誤：誤加a/an在複數名詞前，或使用so discouraging instead of such discouraging words

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她展現出如此出色的領導能力，以至於全班同學都願意跟隨她參加這項社團活動。
translation_exercises.answer: She demonstrated such outstanding leadership that all her classmates were willing to follow her and participate in the club activity.
key_points: such + 形容詞 + 不可數名詞 leadership（不可數名詞無冠詞）
outstanding leadership（抽象名詞搭配形容詞修飾）
複雜結果子句：all her classmates were willing to follow her and participate in...
hints: 框架：such + 形容詞 + 不可數名詞 + that + 結果子句；leadership為不可數名詞，不需冠詞
區別：leadership是抽象不可數名詞，不同於ability（可數或不可數）；結果子句可使用複雜句結構(willing to + V)
